content:
# Upscaling

**Summary**: The process of replacing a fine-scale model with an equivalent coarse-scale model.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-adeyemi|Adeyemi, 2022]] evaluated the impact of different upscaling methods on EDMM accuracy.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-adeyemi|Adeyemi, 2022]] simplifying a fine-scale model to a coarse scale

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-adeyemi|Adeyemi, 2022]] compared results using different upscaling algorithms.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- EDMM is robust against variations in upscaling methods (PSM, WDU, GA). ([[2022-adeyemi|Adeyemi, 2022, p. 53]])
